text:
“U-turn” means the turning of a vehicle upon a highway so as to proceed in the opposite direction, whether accomplished by one continuous movement or not.

GENERAL RULES AND APPLICABILITY
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484B
##### § 484B.077 — “U-turn” defined.

“U-turn” means the turning of a vehicle upon a highway so as to proceed in the opposite direction, whether accomplished by one continuous movement or not.

GENERAL RULES AND APPLICABILITY

subsections.text: “U-turn” means the turning of a vehicle upon a highway so as to proceed in the opposite direction, whether accomplished by one continuous movement or not.
